_doc.purpose: Maps MITRE CWE IDs to cf_atlas-specific high-level categories for the v8.6.0 Wave B CWE rollup. Loaded by cwe_catalog_fetcher.py at upsert time; any CWE not in this seed defaults to 'Other' (so the table always has a fully-resolved cf_atlas_category).
categories: RCE — remote code execution / command injection / arbitrary code execution
DoS — denial of service / resource exhaustion / infinite loop
Info-Disclosure — sensitive information exposure / data leakage
Memory-Safety — buffer overflow / use-after-free / out-of-bounds / NULL deref / integer overflow
Injection — XSS / XML / LDAP / CRLF / SQL injection / template injection
Other — anything not in the seed; default fallback
_doc.extending: Add new CWE→category entries below. Keep alphabetised by CWE number for diff readability. To recategorize, edit the value in place. To bulk-add, run `unzip -p /tmp/cwe-1000.csv.zip | head` to inspect the catalog and reference https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/<N>.html for individual CWE pages.
_doc.source: MITRE CWE Research Concepts view (https://cwe.mitre.org/data/csv/1000.csv.zip). Seeded 2026-05-23 against the top-30 most-commonly-encountered CWEs in OSV/GHSA advisories for Python / JS / Rust ecosystems (the languages cf_atlas tracks).
